default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy and preparation for upcoming Tribe meeting, focusing on pillar content and SEO approach.](https://fathom.video/share/VE-eXez8A5n4pNJmxsGGrXxYAxwKSxLy?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Generated a 5,000-word pillar article on AI initiatives, serving as a foundation for future content](https://fathom.video/share/VE-eXez8A5n4pNJmxsGGrXxYAxwKSxLy?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
  - [Plan to produce \~5 pillar pieces/week + 5 SEO articles/week to drive traffic to authority content](https://fathom.video/share/VE-eXez8A5n4pNJmxsGGrXxYAxwKSxLy?tab=summary&timestamp=63.0)
  - [Aim to create a 6-month content roadmap after Tribe's feedback on the initial pillar article](https://fathom.video/share/VE-eXez8A5n4pNJmxsGGrXxYAxwKSxLy?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Long-term goal: Transform pillar content into highly produced, visual reports/guides](https://fathom.video/share/VE-eXez8A5n4pNJmxsGGrXxYAxwKSxLy?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

## Topics

### Pillar Content Strategy

  - [Andrej created a 5,000-word article on "Why most initiatives fail to deliver value"](https://fathom.video/share/VE-eXez8A5n4pNJmxsGGrXxYAxwKSxLy?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
  - [Added placeholder images and notes for custom branded visuals (need Tribe's brand guidelines)](https://fathom.video/share/VE-eXez8A5n4pNJmxsGGrXxYAxwKSxLy?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
  - [Each H2/H3 in pillar content can spawn multiple SEO-focused articles](https://fathom.video/share/VE-eXez8A5n4pNJmxsGGrXxYAxwKSxLy?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Plan to create lead magnets from pillar content as CTAs for published articles](https://fathom.video/share/VE-eXez8A5n4pNJmxsGGrXxYAxwKSxLy?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)

### SEO and Traffic Generation

  - [Emphasize GrowthX's strength in SEO and traffic generation](https://fathom.video/share/VE-eXez8A5n4pNJmxsGGrXxYAxwKSxLy?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [Aim for 5 SEO pieces/week to drive traffic to pillar/authority pages](https://fathom.video/share/VE-eXez8A5n4pNJmxsGGrXxYAxwKSxLy?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [Leverage existing ICP and use case content previously created](https://fathom.video/share/VE-eXez8A5n4pNJmxsGGrXxYAxwKSxLy?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Re-frame SEO content value to Tribe, highlighting its importance for traffic generation](https://fathom.video/share/VE-eXez8A5n4pNJmxsGGrXxYAxwKSxLy?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)

### Content Roadmap and Production

  - [Develop 6-month content roadmap after Tribe's feedback on initial pillar article](https://fathom.video/share/VE-eXez8A5n4pNJmxsGGrXxYAxwKSxLy?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Marcel to share example of highly produced content as aspirational goal](https://fathom.video/share/VE-eXez8A5n4pNJmxsGGrXxYAxwKSxLy?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Aim to transform pillar content into visually rich, magazine-style reports over time](https://fathom.video/share/VE-eXez8A5n4pNJmxsGGrXxYAxwKSxLy?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [Potential new hire with experience in turning studies into guides could assist](https://fathom.video/share/VE-eXez8A5n4pNJmxsGGrXxYAxwKSxLy?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)

### Content Sources and Research

  - [Request more material from Jackie (Tribe contact) for ongoing content creation](https://fathom.video/share/VE-eXez8A5n4pNJmxsGGrXxYAxwKSxLy?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [Utilize external sources (e.g., Accenture, Deloitte, AI Index report) to curate insights](https://fathom.video/share/VE-eXez8A5n4pNJmxsGGrXxYAxwKSxLy?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
  - [Create a "Top AI reports and stats" article as a repository of key industry publications](https://fathom.video/share/VE-eXez8A5n4pNJmxsGGrXxYAxwKSxLy?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Jimmy provided references and links for additional content sources](https://fathom.video/share/VE-eXez8A5n4pNJmxsGGrXxYAxwKSxLy?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Andrej to lead upcoming call with Tribe, Marcel to augment](https://fathom.video/share/VE-eXez8A5n4pNJmxsGGrXxYAxwKSxLy?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [Send pillar article to Tribe for review and calibration](https://fathom.video/share/VE-eXez8A5n4pNJmxsGGrXxYAxwKSxLy?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Develop 6-month content plan after receiving Tribe's feedback](https://fathom.video/share/VE-eXez8A5n4pNJmxsGGrXxYAxwKSxLy?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Create list of top AI reports, podcasts, and resources for future reference](https://fathom.video/share/VE-eXez8A5n4pNJmxsGGrXxYAxwKSxLy?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Request additional content material from Jackie at Tribe](https://fathom.video/share/VE-eXez8A5n4pNJmxsGGrXxYAxwKSxLy?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)

action_items.description: Add creating lead magnet from pillar content to monthly agenda
Draft 6-month content roadmap after receiving article feedback from Tribe
Send example of past content roadmap to Andrej via internal channel
Request more material from Jackie for future content creation
Create article listing top AI reports, stats, podcasts w/ summaries
